# ReTHINK CNERGY

> ReTHINK CNERGY is a California-based boutique firm helping small businesses rethink how they operate, market, and grow in the age of AI. We combine 20+ years of international operating experience with modern AI strategy, GEO/AEO expertise, and two of our own software products, plus advisory engagements with a small number of independent client firms.

## About

- Legal name: ReTHINK CNERGY, Inc.
- Founded: October 25, 2021
- Headquarters: Orange County, California, USA
- Website: https://rethinkcnergy.com
- Contact: parham@rethinkcnergy.com

## People

- Parham Shariat — CEO & Co-founder; Strategic Director. 20+ years of international business experience across healthcare, technology, real estate, and consumer goods. Wharton AI-certified.
- Mohammad Salamati — CTO & Co-founder. Specializes in AI, machine learning, computer vision, and full-stack development.

## Services

- AI Strategy & Advisory — fractional Chief Strategy Officer engagements and board advisory for 10–200 person businesses.
- GEO / AEO Readiness — Generative Engine Optimization and Answer Engine Optimization, including the GRI™ (GEO Readiness Index) audit methodology.
- Custom AI Builds — bespoke software for qualified clients where off-the-shelf tools do not fit.
- Speaking & Workshops — keynotes, executive briefings, and half-day workshops on AI strategy and the Grand Recalibration.

## Products (built and run by ReTHINK CNERGY)

- [SiteMarketing.ai](https://sitemarketing.ai) — AI-driven marketing audits and strategy for growth-focused small businesses.
- [AloHelp](https://rethinkcnergy.com/products/alohelp) — AI-driven Software as a Medical Device (SaMD) for autism detection, using MRI/fMRI brain imaging and deep learning with explainable Grad-CAM visualizations for clinicians. Pre-launch; pursuing FDA De Novo clearance.
- [Brain.Gritiva](https://brain.gritiva.com) — AI orchestration workspace for building, testing, and running custom AI agents with multi-model support and Brain Server monitoring.
- [Powerful Blueprints](https://powerfulblueprints.com) — a structured interview platform featuring career stories from proven CEOs, authors, and artists.

## Clients (independent firms we advise)

- [Iranian Citizen Services](https://www.iraniancitizen.com) — document consulting for Iranians in the U.S. and Canada: passports, national ID (smart cards), birth certificates, powers of attorney, and Mikhak. Not a law firm.
- [Salamat Legal](https://salamatlegal.com) — comprehensive legal services in Iranian real estate, family, and intellectual property law; offices in Tehran and Orange County.
- [Millennium Design & Services](https://www.millenniumtilemarble.com) — Orange County general contractor since 1987: residential and commercial construction, custom homes, whole-house and kitchen/bath remodels, tenant improvements.

## Optional

- [Insights](https://rethinkcnergy.com/insights) — long-form writing on AI strategy, GEO readiness, and the Grand Recalibration thesis.
- [FAQ](https://rethinkcnergy.com/faq) — plain-English answers to the questions small business owners ask about AI.
- [Services](https://rethinkcnergy.com/services) — engagement shapes, deliverables, and how we work.
- [About](https://rethinkcnergy.com/about) — company origin, founders, and philosophy.
